quoteLast: The time from 4 to 8 P.M. is divided into two short watches, called “dog-watches,” for the purpose of regulating or keeping them in proper succession.

quoteLast: : First explosion occurred, loud and violent, but no     damage or inconvenience. Very shortly afterwards a second     explosion. This was considerably more violent, shattering several     lights and flooding the after-periscope. Heavy shock throughout     the boat, but no serious damage. Order was given to 'blow     externals.' While rising, a third explosion occurred of about the     same intensity as the first. On breaking surface made recognition     signals...."
